title: The Silence of the Sled Dogs: The Disappearance of the Lost Patrol

scenes.text: A routine expedition turns into a haunting mystery.
It happened in the Mackenzie Mountains of Canada.
In 1910, the Lost Patrol disappeared without a trace while searching for a missing team.
The story remains a chilling reminder of the wilderness's power.
Despite extensive searches, their fate remains unknown.
scenes.label: NEVER FOUND

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Mackenzie Mountains, Canada - 1910. An expedition vanished into the frozen wilderness, leaving only questions behind. Their fate remains a mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!
